_comment: News + members + teaching. Edit this file then run `node tools/build.js`. Homepage shows the most recent items (news 8, members current, teaching = latest year only); full lists on the All-news / All-members / All-teaching pages. News: newest first. 'highlight':true shows the item in blue. Teaching: one entry per term {year, term, courses[]}, newest first.

news.html: Two papers accepted to IEEE Transactions on Consumer Electronics on decentralized privacy-preserving schemes for medical IoT and agricultural consumer electronics.
Paper on 6G space-terrestrial handover authentication accepted to IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security (TIFS).
Selected as a Technical Program Committee member for IEEE ICC 2026 and a Program Committee member for IEEE SecDev (2024–2026).
The Information Security & Privacy (ISNP) Lab was established at Gachon University. We are recruiting motivated graduate / undergraduate students and postdocs — please contact with your CV.
